texto: You cannot force someone to believe something they do not believe
autor: you can only manage to force them to speak or act as if they do.
explicacao: Citação de you can only manage to force them to speak or act as if they do. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “You cannot force someone to believe something they do not believe” articula reflexao, mokokoma-mokhonoana, believe em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
